items.title: Two Tankers Carrying Saudi Crude Make U-turns in Red Sea After Houthi Warning
items.desc: Two oil tankers loaded with Saudi crude for China and India made U-turns in the Red Sea on Tuesday, heading towards the Suez Canal rather than braving the Yemeni coast at the sea's mouth following a warning from Yemen's Iran-aligned Houthi militia.
